case_title: EDM TEK, INC. VS HIEMSTRA PRODUCT DEVELOPMENT LLC

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY EDM TEK, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT HIEMSTRA PRODUCT DEVELOPMENT LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-28-2007 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DEFT'S REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE DENIED. COPY OF DENIAL SENT TO PARTIES.

DEFENDANT REQUEST FOR A CONTINUANCE TO BE SIGNED BY JUDGE, $10.00 FEE PAID.
